name: Rosalie
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: The most generous of the one-bedroom residences at Green Coast — over 102 square metres gross.
description: The most generous of the one-bedroom residences at Green Coast, Palasë — over 102 square metres gross on the second floor of the stone-built village quarter. A broad living room anchors the plan, steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach that has made this stretch of the Riviera Albania's most sought-after coastal address.
highlights: The largest one-bedroom plan at Green Coast
Broad living room on the village quarter
Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_h2: Green Coast, Palasë — the Albanian Riviera
location_body: Green Coast sits on the Palasë stretch of the Albanian Riviera, where the Ceraunian hillside drops to the Ionian. The resort is built as a stone village — plazas, promenades and pools threaded between terraced buildings — with a Blue Flag beach below and Himarë along the coast. It is Albania's most established seaside address, and the residences sit inside it rather than alongside it.
